title: Site Integration Tester (M/F/D)*
description:
In this position, you will work directly on site in highly automated large-scale projects and will be responsible for the coordination and implementation system integration tests of our fully automated intralogistics systems.

What you'll be handling:

- Organisation and implementation of interdisciplinary functional, performance and availability tests until customer acceptance
- Coordination and leadership of test teams onsite at our well-known customer sites
- Central contact for project management, customers and suppliers
- Monitoring and controlling of project progress
- Creation of test reports and evaluations

What you'll need:

- Profound technical education (higher technical school, university)
- Experience in conducting tests, ideally with automated intralogistics systems
- Basic skills in the area of Controls and IT
- Willingness to travel internationally (approx. 90%) and good English and German language skills
- Confident manner, strong communication skills and a high level of personal initiative

What you'll receive:

- An appreciative working environment, motivated team and an open feedback culture
- Cooperation across departments in international teams
- Responsibility in a successful international company with a strong focus on culture and values
- A reliable and stable employer based on the philosophy "Focusing on People – Learning and Growing"
- International travel and getting to know new countries and cultures

We offer an attractive salary in line with the market, which can be above the collective agreement depending on qualifications and experience. The minimum gross basic salary based on full-time employment per year is 55,772 Euro.

*TGW is an employer that promotes equal opportunities. We invite everybody interested in this job to apply.
